title: 4 Must-Buy Stocks for Stellar Earnings Growth

title: 3 Manufacturing Electronics Stocks to Gain From Improving Supply Chains
text: Improving supply chains and signs of an uptick in manufacturing activities favor the Zacks Manufacturing - Electronics industry's near-term prospects. ETN, AOS and ENS are well-placed to capitalize on the buoyancy in the industry.

title: Eaton names Adam Wadecki senior vice president, Internal Audit
text: DUBLIN--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Intelligent power management company Eaton (NYSE:ETN) today announced that Adam Wadecki, Ph.D., has been named senior vice president, Internal Audit, effective September 27. He succeeds Christina Bosserd, who was named vice president, Finance for Electrical Sector, Americas, at Eaton. Wadecki will report to Tom Okray, Eaton's executive vice president and chief financial officer and will join the company's senior leadership team. Wadecki joins Eaton from General Electric.

title: Eaton Vance Floating-Rate Income Trust and Eaton Vance Senior Income Trust Announce Commencement of Tender Offers
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Eaton Vance Floating-Rate Income Trust (NYSE: EFT) and Eaton Vance Senior Income Trust (NYSE: EVF) (each, a “Fund,” and, together, the “Funds”) each announced today the commencement of a cash tender offer (each, a “Tender Offer,” and together, the “Tender Offers”). As previously announced, each Fund will purchase for cash up to 10% of its outstanding common shares at a price per share equal to 98% of its net asset value (“NAV”) per share, determined as of the close of r.

title: 5 Solid Stocks to Buy on Jump in August Industrial Production

title: Here's Why You Should Add Eaton (ETN) to Your Portfolio Now

title: Eaton to invest another $150 million in North America operations, create 600 jobs at a new El Paso plant
text: Power management company Eaton Corp. ETN, -4.26% said Wednesday it will invest an additional $150 million to expand supply of its electrical power distribution to customers in North America. As part of the plan, the company will create more than 600 new skilled manufacturing jobs at a new facility in El Paso, Texas.

title: S&P500 Logs Worst Month Since February: 5 Top Stocks in ETF
text: The S&P 500 had its worst month since February, losing 1.4% in August. Despite the losses, some stocks in the ETF stood tall.

title: Eaton Vance Floating-Rate Income Trust and Eaton Vance Senior Income Trust Announce Tender Offers to Purchase up to 10% of Outstanding Common Shares
